hooks.command: W=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/../diagnostics/lib/time-hook.sh; H=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/bootstrap-substrate.sh; if [ -x "$W" ]; then bash "$W" long-session SessionStart bash "$H"; else bash "$H"; fi
W=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/../diagnostics/lib/time-hook.sh; H=${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/surface-progress.sh; if [ -x "$W" ]; then bash "$W" long-session SessionStart bash "$H"; else bash "$H"; fi
